title: deprea harlingiana
intro: Deprea harlingiana, also known as the Bear's Eye or Western Deprea, is a perennial herb belonging to the Solanaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly as a treatment for snakebites, and is also known to have analgesic and anti-inflammatory effects. The plant's health benefits include its ability to reduce pain and swelling, as well as its use in treating wounds and skin conditions. Herbal preparations of Deprea harlingiana can be made into teas, tinctures, or salves, and are often used in traditional medicine to promote healing and relief from various ailments.
